extraction.one_line_summary: POGAČAR attacked early on final climb to Luz Ardiden, took stage win plus time bonuses to extend GC lead over VINGEGAARD by 6 seconds.
tactical_patterns: POGAČAR prioritized time bonuses even with 5:45 GC lead, attacking early on Luz Ardiden rather than waiting for maximum damage.
INEOS tempo during PAGACHO breakaway attempt prevented any meaningful GC reshuffling despite aggressive riding from lower-placed contenders.
B&B Hotel explicitly hunting breakaway spots pre-Tourmalet with MAHORIČ/PÉRICHON/ALAPHILIPPE, suggesting team directive to salvage Tour with stage hunting.

rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: positive: Won stage, extended GC lead, and claimed polka dots on final mountain stage, signaling complete dominance across all terrain
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: Lost 6 additional seconds to POGAČAR despite already trailing by nearly 6 minutes, showing no capacity to reduce deficit
rider_signals.VAN AERT Wout: negative: Lost polka dot jersey by 40 points on final mountain stage after multiple breakaway days, revealing futility of accumulation strategy against true climber
